name: Tower Defense Zombies
description: Get ready for hordes of zombies that only care about eating brains! Use your brain against them and build your defenses. Create towers of mass-zombie destruction to confront various enemies. Zombie siege! Endless 30 unique towers 13 different enemies 3 different power ups
instructions: Collect coins to build new towers and buy more space for them Merge the towers together to make them stronger and faster Use boosters to give your towers special effects to destroy more zombies
